rules.lowAcidityDesc: The dish lacks sourness — try adding lemon, vinegar, or tomatoes.
rules.lowUmamiDesc: Not enough savory depth — consider soy sauce, parmesan, or mushrooms.
rules.lowFatDesc: The dish needs more richness — add olive oil, butter, or avocado.
rules.lowAromaDesc: Missing aromatic complexity — add fresh herbs, garlic, or spices.
rules.lowSweetnessDesc: A touch of sweetness could balance the dish — try honey or caramelized onion.
rules.lowBitternessDesc: Adding a bitter element like greens or citrus zest could add complexity.
rules.highCarbsDesc: Carbohydrate content is elevated — consider replacing some starch with vegetables.
rules.lowProteinDesc: Protein is below optimal — add meat, fish, eggs, or legumes.
rules.highFatRatioDesc: Fat makes up a large share of calories — reduce oil or use leaner ingredients.
rules.lowFiberDesc: Fiber is below recommended — add vegetables, whole grains, or legumes.
rules.highSugarDesc: Sugar content is elevated — reduce sweet ingredients or use alternatives.
rules.dominanceDesc: One ingredient dominates the flavor profile — add more variety.
rules.missingFatDesc: No fat source detected — add oil, butter, or nuts for better flavor and satiety.
rules.missingAcidDesc: No acidic ingredient — add lemon, vinegar, or tomatoes to brighten the dish.
rules.missingAromaticsDesc: No aromatic herbs or spices — add garlic, herbs, or pepper.
rules.missingProteinDesc: No significant protein source — add meat, fish, eggs, or legumes.
rules.missingVegetablesDesc: No vegetables detected — add greens, roots, or other veggies for balance.
rules.high_sweetness_desc: Sweetness is very dominant — consider balancing with acid or bitter.
rules.high_acidity_desc: Acidity is very prominent — balance with fat or sweetness.
rules.high_bitterness_desc: Bitterness is strong — balance with sweetness or fat.
rules.high_umami_desc: Umami is very intense — generally fine, but can feel heavy.
rules.high_fat_desc: Fat flavor is dominant — add acid or fresh herbs to cut through.
rules.high_aroma_desc: Aroma is very strong — might overpower delicate ingredients.
